## 2. Detailed Anomaly Log & Resolution Actions

Below is the list of all anomalous records identified in `Expenses Export.csv` by the **17-detector pipeline** and the exact resolution applied prior to database insertion:

| CSV Row | Date | Description | Payer | Amount | Flagged Anomaly | Applied Resolution / Action | Status |
|:---:|---|---|---|---|---|---|:---:|
| **5** | 08-02-2026 | dinner - marina bites | Dev | ₹3,200 | `DUPLICATE_EXACT` | Auto-detected exact match with Row 4 (Marina Bites, Dev, 3200). | **Skipped** |
| **7** | 10-02-2026 | Electricity Feb | Aisha | "1,200" | `AMOUNT_FORMAT_ERROR` | Stripped quotes and commas to parse valid numeric float `1200.00`. | **Imported** |
| **10** | 15-02-2026 | Cylinder refill | Rohan | ₹899.995 | `AMOUNT_PRECISION_ERROR` | Auto-rounded fractional cents to standard numeric `900.00` INR. | **Imported** |
| **11** | 18-02-2026 | Groceries DMart | Priya S | ₹1,875 | `UNKNOWN_PERSON` | Mapped string `"Priya S"` to known database member `Priya`. | **Imported** |
| **13** | 22-02-2026 | House cleaning supplies | *Empty* | ₹780 | `MISSING_PAID_BY` | User manually assigned `Aisha` as payer in Review UI. | **Imported** |
| **14** | 25-02-2026 | Rohan paid Aisha back | Rohan | ₹5,000 | `SETTLEMENT_AS_EXPENSE` | Auto-detected keyword "paid back"; reclassified from expense to **Settlement**. | **Imported** |
| **15** | 28-02-2026 | Pizza Friday | Aisha | ₹1,440 | `PERCENTAGE_SUM_ERROR` | Details summed to 110%. User corrected to 25% equal splits in UI. | **Imported** |
| **20** | 09-03-2026 | Goa villa booking | Dev | $540 | `MISSING_EXCHANGE_RATE` | User applied and locked conversion exchange rate at `84.50` INR/USD. | **Imported** |
| **21** | 10-03-2026 | Beach shack lunch | Rohan | $84 | `MISSING_EXCHANGE_RATE` | User applied and locked conversion exchange rate at `84.50` INR/USD. | **Imported** |
| **23** | 11-03-2026 | Parasailing | Dev | $150 | `NONMEMBER_IN_SPLIT` | Split detailed `"Kabir"` (non-member). User excluded him, splitting among group. | **Imported** |
| **25** | 11-03-2026 | Thalassa dinner | Rohan | ₹2,450 | `DUPLICATE_CONFLICT` | Checked against Row 24 (Aisha paid 2400). Payer Rohan row skipped. | **Skipped** |
| **26** | 12-03-2026 | Parasailing refund | Dev | -$30 | `NEGATIVE_AMOUNT` | Applied as a negative expense value (reducing members' balances). | **Imported** |
| **27** | Mar-14 | Airport cab | rohan | ₹1,100 | `AMBIGUOUS_DATE` | Parsed `"Mar-14"` as `2026-03-14`; trimmed whitespace on payer name. | **Imported** |
| **28** | 15-03-2026 | Groceries DMart | Priya | 2105 | `MISSING_CURRENCY` | Auto-defaulted empty currency field to standard group currency `'INR'`. | **Imported** |
| **31** | 22-03-2026 | Swiggy dinner | Priya | ₹0 | `ZERO_AMOUNT` | Logged warning for zero value. User selected to skip row. | **Skipped** |
| **34** | 04-05-2026 | Deep cleaning service | Rohan | ₹2,500 | `AMBIGUOUS_DATE` | Date was May 4 vs April 5. User confirmed and mapped to `2026-04-05`. | **Imported** |
| **36** | 02-04-2026 | Groceries BigBasket | Priya | ₹2,640 | `MEMBER_INACTIVE_ON_DATE` | Split included Meera who left on March 31. Engine auto-excluded Meera. | **Imported** |
| **38** | 08-04-2026 | Sam deposit share | Sam | ₹15,000 | `SETTLEMENT_AS_EXPENSE` | Detected keyword "deposit"; reclassified from expense to **Settlement**. | **Imported** |
| **42** | 18-04-2026 | Furniture common room | Aisha | ₹12,000 | `SPLIT_TYPE_MISMATCH` | Equal split type but details column had shares; normalized to equal. | **Imported** |
